properties.name: Attack, Melee, AoE, Movement, Travel, Physical

socketedItems.secDescrText: Charges at a targeted location or enemy, pushing away enemies in your path and repeatedly dealing off-hand damage in a small area in front of you. You deal damage in a larger area when you reach the target. The further you travel, the more damage you deal, and the greater your chance of stunning enemies.
explicitMods: 252 to 378 Base Off Hand Physical Damage
8 to 12 Added Physical Damage per 15 Armour or Evasion Rating on Shield
75% increased Stun Threshold reduction on enemies at Maximum charge distance
100% more Damage with Hits at Maximum Charge Distance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Each supported spell skill will track damage you take, and be triggered when the total damage taken reaches a threshold. Cannot support skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Vaal skills, channelling skills, and skills with a reservation cannot be triggered.
explicitMods: This Gem can only Support Skill Gems requiring Level 62 or lower
Trigger Supported Spells when you take 1804 total Damage from Hits
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Take less Physical and Elemental Damage for a short time. Consumes up to 5 Endurance Charges to lengthen the buff and further lessen Physical Damage taken. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods: 20% increased Buff Duration per Endurance Charge removed
This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect
15.0% less Physical Damage taken per Endurance Charge removed
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports attack skills.

socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Doedre's Elixir
explicitMods: Removes 80% of your maximum Energy Shield on use
You take 50% of your maximum Life as Chaos Damage on use
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: Doedre Darktongue knew the Way of the Thaumaturge.
In order to receive, one must give... without hesitation.

name: Annihilation's Approach
explicitMods: Take 6000 Fire Damage per Second while Flame-Touched
Gain Adrenaline when you become Flame-Touched
Lose Adrenaline when you cease to be Flame-Touched
flavourText: Pray that the flames find fascination,
for the true end follows when the great eye closes.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Raises a spectral version of a defeated foe as a minion to fight for you in battle.
explicitMods: Minions have +50% to all Elemental Resistances
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills that create minions which can be damaged. Cannot support triggered skills.

Minions from Supported Skills take 15% of Hit Damage from their Life before
you if they are your only Minion

socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: The Black Sekhema was a formidable fighter
alongside her dekhara, but she was unstoppable
when she fought atop her trusted mount, Shiyo.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports spell skills that hit enemies and have no reservation. Cannot support brand skills, orb skills, channelling skills, arcane skills, Vaal skills or skills used by traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods: Supported Skills deal 10% increased Spell Damage

socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: Immortality could grant Catarina the time necessary to shape
a better world... but building requires sacrifice, and the useless
would be crushed into the foundation of her new utopia.

socketedItems.secDescrText: This spell creates ethereal blades which orbit in an area around you, dealing damage every 0.6 seconds to all enemies in their radius. As more blades are added, the damage becomes greater and more frequent.

Can have up to 10 active spinning blades
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports spell skills, making their effect reoccur when cast. Cannot support skills with cooldowns, triggered skills, Brand skills, Vaal skills, channelling skills, skills with a reservation, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods: Supported Skills deal 11% increased Spell Damage

Supported Spells gain a Seal every 0.64 seconds, to a maximum of 4 Seals
Supported Spells are Unsealed when cast, and their effects Reoccur for each Seal lost
Supported Skills deal 29% less Damage when Reoccurring
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "True power grows with patience. You must nurture it.
You learn what it needs. You provide. You wait. Only
then, when it is ripe, does it yield its fruits."

name: Marylene's Fallacy
flavourText: "Marylene stroked the medallion at her breast
before every duel and every cast of the die."
- Victario, the People's Poet

flavourText: "I staggered on, dying of thirst... I thought I found respite,
but no... it was a pit of newborns... dry and hollow...
and they screamed still, begging me for vengeance..."

You mask it with heat and ire
But they know.
They know.
